name: JobNumber
label: Job Number
notes: Unique job identifier from Valcre
bridgeNote: bridge: loe.valcre_job_id || job.job_number || job.id → store 'job-number'

name: JobName
label: Job Name
notes: Job/project name
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: JobStatus
label: Job Status
notes: Current job status
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: SubjectProperty
label: Subject Property
notes: Property display name from Valcre
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: ClientCompanyName
label: Client Company Name
notes: Client company display name
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: ClientOrganizationAddress
label: Client Organization Address
notes: 4-field structured address (street/city/province/postal) → Contact.AddressStreet/City/State/PostalCode. ⚠ CREATE-ONLY (written only when minting a new contact, never re-PATCHed on edit). NO-CROSS: client address parts come ONLY from client fields, never the property.
bridgeNote: bridge splits client_address via parseAddress into store client-address/city/province/postal (4 fields)

name: ClientFirstName
label: Client First Name
notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY (set on new-contact creation, not re-PATCHed).
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: ClientLastName
label: Client Last Name
notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY.
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: ClientTitle
label: Client Title
notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY (app key clientTitle).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: ClientPhone
label: Client Phone
notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY.
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: ClientEmail
label: Client Email
notes: ⚠ Contact CREATE-ONLY. Also the match key — existing contact reused if email matches.
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: PropertyName
label: Property Name
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: PropertyAddress
label: Property Address
bridgeNote: bridge takes parseAddress(...).street ONLY — drops city/province/postal for the property (client address keeps all 4); parseAddress is a heuristic comma-split

name: PropertyType
label: Property Type
notes: Primary property classification — cascade trigger. Writes BOTH Valcre fields: Property.Type (single validated enum, first of the split) AND Property.Types (multi PascalCase from PropertyTypeEnum).
bridgeNote: bridge typeMap collapses Single-Family→Multi-Family & Agriculture→Land (lossy); does NOT honor the registry Property.Type(single)+Property.Types(multi) dual-write

name: PropertySubtype
label: Property Subtype
notes: Secondary type — overrides Property Rights
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: Tenancy
label: Tenancy
notes: Occupancy type — highest priority override for Property Rights. Valcre custom field CF12408 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: StateofImprovements
label: State of Improvements
notes: Derived from Status of Improvements. Valcre custom field CF12409 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: StatusofImprovements
label: Status of Improvements
notes: DIRECT user pick — drives the Value Scenarios + Approaches + Property Rights cascade. Valcre custom field CF12407 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: InterestAppraised
label: Interest Appraised (Property Rights)
notes: DERIVED (derivePropertyRights) from PropertyType + Subtype + Tenancy — not user-typed. App key interestAppraised → Valcre custom field CF12412 (MultiOption). User sees 'Property Rights'.
bridgeNote: value flows via loe.property_rights_appraised → store id 'property-rights' (id renamed, value faithful)

name: AuthorizedUse
label: Authorized Use
notes: Insurance overrides Value Scenarios. App keys authorizedUse + intendedUse both → Valcre custom field CF12413 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: value flows via job.intended_use → store id 'intended-use' (id renamed, value faithful)

name: ValueScenarios
label: Value Scenarios
notes: DERIVED (deriveValueScenarios) from Status of Improvements + Authorized Use — not user-typed. Valcre custom field CF12414 (MultiOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: ApproachestoValue
label: Approaches to Value
notes: DERIVED (deriveApproaches) from Status of Improvements + Authorized Use — not user-typed. Valcre custom field CF12415 (MultiOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: AssignmentType
label: Assignment Type
notes: Single or multiple property. Valcre custom field CF12416 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: ReportType
label: Report Type
notes: Comprehensive, Concise, or Form. Valcre custom field CF12417 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: carried into the report builder by useLoadJobIntoReport bridge

name: DesktopReport
label: Desktop Report
notes: Desktop-only report flag. Valcre custom field CF12418 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: Valuetimeframe
label: Value Timeframe
notes: Current, Prospective, or Retrospective. Valcre custom field CF12419 (SingleOption).
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings

name: InspectionDate
label: Inspection Date
bridgeNote: NOT bridged into the report builder today — no mapping in useLoadJobIntoReport.fieldMappings
